# Hepta (hepta.no, heptatech.io)

## Purpose of this file
The public marketing site is a JavaScript (React) single-page application served from
both `hepta.no` (Norwegian-language brand "Hepta") and `heptatech.io` (English-language
brand "Heptatech"). Tools that fetch HTML without executing JavaScript may see an
almost empty shell. This file and `/hepta-overview.html` provide the same factual
overview in plain text and static HTML so assistants, crawlers, and archive tools can
read what Hepta does without running client-side code.

## Organization
Hepta is a small software and design studio based in Oslo, Norway. It builds production
web systems, product UI, and digital infrastructure for teams that need clarity and
reliability. The international / English-language presence operates as **Heptatech**
at `heptatech.io`. The two domains share the same studio, team, and services.

## Products and services
- **Calar OS** — First-party website intelligence: who is on the site, how they move
  through the funnel, attribution to channels and campaigns, lead scoring from
  on-site behaviour, and signals for sales teams.
  Path: https://hepta.no/calar-os
- **Development** — Websites, web applications, APIs, integrations, performance,
  accessibility, and cloud deployment.
  Path: https://hepta.no/development
- **Visual identity** — Brand systems, typography, colour, and art direction aligned
  with how the product ships.
  Path: https://hepta.no/visual-identity
- **Consulting** — Assessment, planning, and improvement of digital presence.
  Path: https://hepta.no/consulting
- **About** — Team and how Hepta works with clients.
  Path: https://hepta.no/about
- **Contact** — Enquiries and project discussions.
  Path: https://hepta.no/contact
- **News** — Updates and articles when published.
  Path: https://hepta.no/news

## Contact
- General (Norway): j@hepta.no
- International (Heptatech): hello@heptatech.io
- Contact form: https://hepta.no/contact

## Brands and domains
- hepta.no — Norwegian brand, primary site
- heptatech.io — English-language sister brand (same studio, same services)

## Privacy
High-level privacy summary: https://hepta.no/privacy
(That route is part of the React app; for a static summary, see the "Privacy & data"
section in `/hepta-overview.html`.)

## Static mirror (full HTML)
https://hepta.no/hepta-overview.html

## Last updated
2026-04-28
